replies.msg:
點解佢哋冇香港人咁醒
搞到畀佢哋打刧咗個中國返嚟

13個月，100餘次大罷工，香港呢？ 醒未？

中共一大之後，中國共產黨（以下簡稱「中共」）成立了領導工人運動的中國勞動組合書記部。從1922年1月到1923年2月，掀起了中國工人運動的第一個高潮。在持續13個月的時間裏，中國發生大小罷工100餘次，參加人數達到了30萬以上。其中，京漢鐵路工人大罷工上演了最為慘重的一幕

記唔記得7、8月既時候，臨有行動前一日既連登，係充滿住遊行路線、離開方法、行動目的地既街坊整既攻略、仲有各種各樣既行動資訊整合，所有行動都係至小早半個月搞，有D 活動更加係會根據其重要性去調配，例如我記得葵青區遊行係推遲左成個月的。

反思行動及行動數量

replies.msg:
Below is excerpt from your quoted link "https://lih.kg/1680839"
"辦公室代表講完嘢交咗堆簽名比佢之後佢竟然咁講（我直接用英文原句）代表：Yes, we definitely support Hong Kong independence and democracy. I will make sure these papers get delivered to Senator Feinstein."
1. Source is from 3rd party ( Senator office's assistant), not directly in any public material sourced directly from Senator Feinstein.
2. My knowledge of "assistant" working for Senator's office does not have any legal power of representation.
3. Senator Feinstein's viewpoint may not be the same as standpoints of other senators' , majority of senators , or even President Trump.
4. The scope of your claim extend to "international" instead of one country. Even if USA agrees, it may not have the same opinions as the other countries.

Because of lack of FACTS supporting the CLAIM, I cannot come to the same conclusion to establish same claim as yours.

More FACT CHECK needed.

13個月，100餘次大罷工，香港呢？ 醒未？

中共一大之後，中國共產黨（以下簡稱「中共」）成立了領導工人運動的中國勞動組合書記部。從1922年1月到1923年2月，掀起了中國工人運動的第一個高潮。在持續13個月的時間裏，中國發生大小罷工100餘次，參加人數達到了30萬以上。其中，京漢鐵路工人大罷工上演了最為慘重的一幕

Below is excerpt from your quoted link "https://lih.kg/1680839"
"辦公室代表講完嘢交咗堆簽名比佢之後佢竟然咁講（我直接用英文原句）代表：Yes, we definitely support Hong Kong independence and democracy. I will make sure these papers get delivered to Senator Feinstein."
1. Source is from 3rd party ( Senator office's assistant), not directly in any public material sourced directly from Senator Feinstein.
2. My knowledge of "assistant" working for Senator's office does not have any legal power of representation.
3. Senator Feinstein's viewpoint may not be the same as standpoints of other senators' , majority of senators , or even President Trump.
4. The scope of your claim extend to "international" instead of one country. Even if USA agrees, it may not have the same opinions as the other countries.

Because of lack of FACTS supporting the CLAIM, I cannot come to the same conclusion to establish same claim as yours.

More FACT CHECK needed.
